2605.04761.title: Cognitive Twins: Investigating Personalized Thinking Model Building and Its Performance Enhancement with Human-in-the-Loop
2605.04761.paper_summary: This paper presents the Personalized Thinking Model (PTM), a hierarchical and interpretable learner representation designed for AI supported education. PTM organizes evidence from learner journals into a five-layer structure covering behavioral instances, behavioral patterns, cognitive routines, metacognitive tendencies, and self-system values. PTM is grounded in Marzano's New Taxonomy of Educational Objectives and tries to clone learner's thinking model and build cognitive twin. It was constructed using a pipeline that combines large language model inference (Gemini 2.5 Pro), sentence embeddings, dimensionality reduction, and consensus clustering. This paper evaluates PTM fidelity through three methods applied to 40 participants in a seven-week study. First, automatic evaluation using atomic information point matching yielded an overall F1 score of 74.57% before human-in-the-loop (HITL) refinement and 75.48% after refinement. Second, user evaluation using a Likert scale produced mean ratings of 4.26 and 4.30 on a five-point scale for pre and post-HITL conditions respectively. Third, semantic alignment verification showed that topic coherence increased from 0.436 at the behavioral layer to 0.626 at the core value layer, while lexical overlap with journal vocabulary decreased from 0.114 to 0.007 across those same layers. These results suggest that the PTM produces outputs with acceptable fidelity, was generally perceived by users as reflecting their thinking, and showed a pattern consistent with semantic abstraction across layers.
2605.04761.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文提出了個性化思維模型（PTM），這是一種為AI支持教育設計的分層和可解釋的學習者表示法。<lb/>PTM將學習者日誌中的證據組織成一個五層結構，涵蓋行為實例、行為模式、認知常規、元認知傾向和自我系統價值。<lb/>PTM以Marzano的新教育目標分類法為基礎，試圖複製學習者的思維模型並建立認知雙胞胎。<lb/>它是通過一個管道構建的，該管道結合了大型語言模型推理（Gemini 2.5 Pro）、句子嵌入、降維和共識聚類。<lb/>這篇論文通過三種方法對40名參與者在為期七週的研究中評估了PTM的忠實度。<lb/>首先，使用原子信息點匹配的自動評估在進行人機互動（HITL）優化之前產生了74.57%的整體F1分數，優化後為75.48%。<lb/>其次，使用李克特量表的用戶評估在HITL前後的五點量表上分別產生了4.26和4.30的平均評分。<lb/>第三，語義對齊驗證顯示，主題一致性從行為層的0.436增加到核心價值層的0.626，而與日誌詞彙的詞彙重疊從0.114減少到0.007。<lb/>這些結果表明，PTM產生的輸出具有可接受的忠實度，通常被用戶認為反映了他們的思維，並顯示出跨層的一致語義抽象模式。
2605.04761.author: Wu-Yuin Hwang et.al.
2605.04761.authors: Wu-Yuin Hwang, Nur Alif Ilyasa, Muhammad Irfan Luthfi, Yuniar Indrihapsari
